strengths: 15+ years of deep, diverse engineering experience spanning cloud, AI infrastructure, and high-performance systems — directly matching the required tenure and technical scope.

concerns: No explicit mention of a Master’s or PhD in AI — though practical experience may compensate, the preferred credential is unmet.

response.justification: Bogdan’s 15+ years of hands-on engineering across cloud, AI-agent systems, and high-performance infrastructure, combined with his entrepreneurial creation and sustained maintenance of a real-world open-source geospatial platform, demonstrate exceptional alignment with the role’s core mandate: identifying and building strategic AI differentiation through deep technical fluency and leadership — his work at re:cinq on MCP code generators and agentic workflows is a direct, credible match for AI product development responsibilities.
